---
title: "Salicaceae (Willow family)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->


## Planting summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [Aspen](/trees/species/aspen.html) | 1 | — |
| [Black Poplar](/trees/species/black-poplar.html) | 0 | — |
| [Crack Willow](/trees/species/crack-willow.html) | 0 | — |
| [Goat Willow](/trees/species/goat-willow.html) | 0 | — |
